data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The site likely utilizes a microservices architecture to handle various functionalities separately such as messaging, user authentication, and media sharing.
data.technical_spec: Services independently managed and communicate via APIs or messaging queues.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: WhatsApp employs cloud-based infrastructure to handle immense traffic and user load efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes load balancers, containerization, and horizontal scaling techniques.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: WhatsApp employs sharding to distribute its databases across multiple servers for improved performance.
data.technical_spec: MySQL databases with sharding based on user accounts or geolocations.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: The site uses an event-driven architecture to manage real-time messaging and updates.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates message brokers to manage event distribution.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDN for faster content delivery to users across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Global caching and fast data retrieval through distributed servers.
